title: Texas Instruments Stock Slips Post Q1 Results, China Restrictions Impacting Q2 Outlook
text: Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ: TXN) reported first-quarter revenue growth of 14% year-over-year to $4.91 billion, beating the consensus of $4.74 billion. Gross margin expanded by 496 bps to 70.2%.

title: Earnings Results: Texas Instruments stock drops more than 5% as China COVID restrictions blamed for light outlook
